0.q: several salt stress-related genes showed higher expression levels in transgenic plants [including AtSOS1, AtSOS2, AtSOS3], implying their potential to enhance salt tolerance

1.q: overexpressed SaR2R3-MYB15 could mitigate ROS accumulation and reduce cell membrane damage in transgenic Arabidopsis under salt stress

2.q: SaAQP might enhance the salt tolerance of A. thaliana by participating in a reactive oxygen species scavenging mechanism.
